name: Gallade

forms.name: Mega
forms.pokedexDescription: When trying to protect someone, it extends its elbows as if they were swords and fights savagely.

forms.name: Midnight
forms.pokedexDescription: This Pokémon has the ability to disappear into shadows. It uses this skill to ambush people and Pokémon, incapacitating them with its blades before draining them of their vitality. People who live near its territory caution to stay away from shady locations.

forms.name: Mega-Midnight
forms.pokedexDescription: By channeling the power of Mega Evolution, it can cast the area around it in shadows even under the brightest sunlight.

pokedexDescription: A master of courtesy and swordsmanship, it fights using extending swords on its elbows.
